steps.title: Substitute y = 8 into the perimeter equation
steps.content:
The given perimeter equation for the rectangular rug is $ 46 = 2x + 2y $. The width $ y $ of the rug is given as 8 feet. Substitute this value into the equation:
$$ 46 = 2x + 2(8) $$
Simplify the right side: $$ 46 = 2x + 16 $$
Subtract 16 from both sides: $$ 30 = 2x $$
Divide both sides by 2: $$ x = 15 $$
The answer is 15.
